commands.review_summary:
This PR changes prioritized dynamic live model normalization to call `normalizeModelCompat` directly and adds the missing `classifyFailoverReason` export to an auto-reply test mock.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +1. Total +1 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a high-confidence source-level reproduction path: run the targeted `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs` commands from the PR body against the current test mock and dynamic candidate tests. I did not run them because this review is read-only.

target.title: fix(agents): unblock fallback classification tests
target.body:
## Summary
- add the missing `classifyFailoverReason` export to the auto-reply test mock so GPT-5 result-classification tests exercise the intended fallback path
- normalize prioritized dynamic live model hook results with `normalizeModelCompat` directly, avoiding a second provider plugin discovery/runtime lookup after the hook has already resolved the model

## Tests
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts -t 'classifies GPT-5 plan-only|classifies final GPT-5 terminal-empty|rolls back persisted fallback selection' --reporter verbose\n- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/live-model-dynamic-candidates.test.ts --reporter verbose\n\nAlso posted the same branch-level fix context on #84814.
target.author: yu-xin-c
